nodes.label: Tech Stack (HTML5/CSS3/Vanilla JS)
nodes.rationale: Pure frontend DEMO chosen to avoid build tools and frameworks; no external dependencies, works by opening index.html directly in a browser.

nodes.label: Production vs Demo Differences
nodes.rationale: Demo uses localStorage instead of backend database; lacks multi-device sync, server push notifications, user accounts, collaboration, and offline support compared to a production deployment.
